landing.title: Morgen: AI Daily Planner for Calendars & Tasks
landing.text:
Morgen: AI Daily Planner for Calendars & Tasks
Team workflows
Auto-Schedule
Features
Task Management
AI Planner
Frames
Calendar Management
Calendar Automations
Routines
Teams
Integrations
Pricing

Get Started

Team workflows
Auto-Schedule
Features
Task Management
AI Planner
Frames
Calendar Management
Calendar Automations
Routines
Teams
Integrations
Pricing
Resources
Blogs
Guides
FAQs
Contact us
Get Started
Sign in
Daily plans designed by AI, perfected by you
A daily planner that prioritizes your most important to-dos, events, and projects in one app. Get AI-powered recommendations or plan manually.
Get Started
Open Morgen
For Win, Mac, Linux, web & mobile.
No credit card required.
Top performers from leading companies rely on Morgen
Tasks that matter belong on your calendar
Morgen prioritizes impactful work and helps you plan your week.
Feel confident in what to work on next and protect valuable focus time by scheduling tasks from Notion, ClickUp, Linear or Todoist in your calendar.
Proactive assistance you can rely on
Morgen helps you plan ahead and easily adapt to schedule changes as they arise.
Plans that adapt.
AI Planner helps reprioritize your plan in case of conflicts.
Don't miss a task.
Morgen reminds you of uncompleted tasks from previous days.
Stay ahead of deadlines.
AI Planner evaluates your capacity and highlights tasks at risk of being late.
Learn about the AI Planner
Get help from AI without giving up control
Guide the AI Planner by templating your ideal week with Frames. The plan is yours to accept or adapt.
Preview.
AI Planner shows live recommendations in your calendar using Frames for guidance.
Adjust.
Move tasks around or adjust their duration. AI Planner adapts in real-time to your changes.
Schedule.
Confirm to schedule tasks in your calendar and protect time to achieve your goals.
Learn about the AI Planner
Your time shouldn't be scattered across apps
Manage your calendars and tasks together and avoid double-bookings, missed events, and overloaded days.
Combine calendars.
Manage your work and personal commitments in one place.
All your tasks.
Filter and schedule tasks from across project management, to-do, and PKM tools.
Never miss a deadline.
Display due dates on your calendar so nothing gets missed.
Integrate your tasks + calendars
All your calendars in one place
Consolidate calendars from Google, Outlook, Apple, Fastmail and more in one app.
Morgen has the features you need, putting an end to jumping between calendars needed.
Calendar Sets
View your calendars together, one at a time, or in subsets using customizable calendar shortcuts.
Reminders
Set one or more reminders for events and scheduled tasks. Reminders can be configured for each calendar or event.
Built-in scheduling links
Share personalized booking links to allow others to schedule time with you. Your availability is checked in real-time based on the calendars you choose.
Team availability
View your colleagues' availability and get recommended meeting times that won’t disrupt their focus.
Automate your calendar
Calendar sync
. Sync events from one calendar to another to get an accurate view of your availability and avoid double bookings. Customize which events are copied and how they appear in the destination calendar.
Travel time.
Automatically block time for your commute to and from events, taking into account location, mode of travel, and time of day.
Buffer time.
Automatically schedule custom buffers around meetings for intentional breaks or in case they run over.
Curious about Morgen?
Ask an AI what Morgen is and who it's built for. Get an honest, independent overview.
Ask ChatGPT
Ask Claude
Ask Perplexity
High performers rely on Morgen
Cees de Kort
@Cees_de_Kort
Hats off, by far the best Linux-supported scheduling and calendar app so far. Keep up the amazing work!
Magdi
@sarupanda147
I usually don’t do product recommendations but I’ve been using @morgencalendar for a while now on my @ubuntu machine at work and on my MacBook at home, and it's just so great to have the same UX on both machines! Plus, having the tasks right there really helps me stay organized!
Kalyn B.
@KalynB
Morgen makes calendar planning incredibly easy and intuitive. It integrates seamlessly with Notion, allowing me to time block all of my tasks simply by dragging and dropping them into my calendar. Plus, when I need to quickly add a new task on the fly, Morgen’s built-in task feature lets me do it without missing a beat or disrupting my workflow. It’s truly the best of both worlds: powerful scheduling with effortless task management!
Tina Huynh
@tinamchuynh
Okay... I might be in love with @morgencalendar and all its integrations with not only @Google Tasks, and @Zoom but also @Outlook, and much more! What do you use for your #timemanagement / #taskmanagement system?
e.tedaldi
@e_tedaldi
I live by my to-do lists. I recently moved those lists from paper to app, tracking and scheduling my to-dos right in my @morgencalendar. This has been a game changer. Never have I crossed off so many completed to-dos... plus that confetti 🤩 IYKYK.
Shivansh Gaur
@Sh1vanshGaur
Absolutely loving @morgencalendar. I can access my tasks right there and can get them in calender view. How cool is that. But had to change tick tick to todoist but I can work with that.
Kevin
@kbaltruweit
I love Morgen calendar! A beautiful, uncluttered interface and a great tool to manage availability across multiple calendars 😍
Kailyn S.
@KailynS
Using over a year. Love the integration of multiple calendars from varied sources. Seamlessly integrates with my EMR system for my business. Cost efficient! Customer service is *chefs kiss* - any question is quickly answered if it there is not a current feature you can suggest it. Have recommended the app to several friends.
Giulia D'Angelo
@Giulia D'Angelo
I have been using Morgen to combine my calendars, set up my office hours and schedule my day-by-day work. Honestly, it helped me so much in comparison to Outlook. Strongly recommend!
Sorin Sfirlogea
@Sorin
I am depending on a good calendar application for my personal and professional activities and, over the years, I have tried literally all that apps one can imagine. Morgen is the first one that meets all my expectations. I am relying every day on this excellent piece of software.
Sefa Burak Çam
@Sefa
As an assistant professor, I use morgen for managing both professional and personal schedule. And its increasing my efficiency a lot compared to other calendar/task manager apps
Jorge Quintana
@Jorge
I manage 3 businesses cals and family cal as well. had trouble in the past getting meetings scheduled often times having to juggle or manage conflicts in meetings.
Ive tried tools like calendly and did not work well. Morgen solved all my Calendar Issues and even solutions for problems I didn't know I had. all this and I feel like I am just scratching the surface of what this program can do. Absolutely LOVE it and recommend to any serial entrepreneur, and families with busy schedules.
Jashua Walker
@JashuaWalker
The perfect calendar. The perfect scheduler. It's the most affordable calendar and task manager that I have ever come across. I usually have a lot to do in a single week so having the Morgen visual calendar dashboard easily accessible on my phone, Desktop, and Laptop is so worth it. I never forget anything important now. Absolutely Love it.
Chandan Kumar
@Chandan
I’ve tried dozens of productivity apps over the years, but Morgen is hands down the most seamless, well-designed, and effective one I’ve used. It combines calendar, task management, and time blocking in one clean, intuitive interface — and it actually makes me want to plan my day.
Daniel Lam
@Daniel
As a medical student, I needed an app that included comprehensive organization, time management, time blocking, multitasking, and more. I explored several calendar apps, watched many videos and reviews, and found recommendations on Reddit. Morgan was ultimately chosen because it combines a modern and elegant interface with excellent integration of tasks and reminders. Additionally, the ability to have multiple calendars from different accounts (Gmail, Hotmail, Outlook, Office 365, iCloud, etc.) is top-notch.
Ready to take control of time?
Better plan, prioritize, and balance your time with your calendars, tasks, projects, and scheduling in one app.
Get Started
Open Morgen
Data security
Data security and privacy you (and your IT department) can trust. Morgen is committed to protecting your privacy. We will never share or sell your data, and only request access to data necessary for the services you choose.

Switching Providers
15% off for 1 year

Motion
Reclaim
Fantastical
Sunsama
Contact us
Academic, Student & Nonprofit
25% off forever
Students, academics, and nonprofits qualify for 25% off Morgen Pro. Start your free trial then contact us from your institutional email to request a discount.
Contact us
Frequently asked questions
What are your accepted payment methods?
Morgen accepts payment from PayPal, Apple Pay and Cards (including Mastercard, Visa, Maestro, American Express, Discover, Diners Club, JCB, UnionPay, and Mada). Payments are processed by Paddle.
Do you offer discounts?
Morgen offers 25% discounts to non-profits, students, and those working in education.
We also offer 15% discounts to those switching to Morgen from one of our competitors.
After starting your free trial, please email
connect@morgen.so
to request your discount code.
How do I get charged when I add or remove team members?
When you add or remove team members within a billing cycle you will be charged or reimbursed the corresponding pro-rated amounts.
Team Admins can add or remove team members from
Teams and Billing
.
What is your refund policy?
We keep it simple. If you are not satisfied with Morgen or believe you made a mistake in choosing your plan, please email
connect@morgen.so
.   We'll be happy to refund the full amount (not pro-rated) within your first 30 days of signing up to Morgen.
Learn more about our
Refund Policy
.
Do I have to use the Morgen app to use Morgen Assist workflows?
You can use Morgen Assist directly with your Google, Outlook, iCloud, and Fastmail calendars without using the Morgen app.
The Morgen app gives you an enhanced experience (and we think they are pretty fantastic), but it isn't necessary to deploy and use our smart workflows.
Will Morgen work with my organization’s calendars?
Morgen integrates with nearly all calendar providers, including Outlook, Microsoft 365, Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Fastmail, and many more.
Morgen Assist currently integrates with Outlook, Google, iCloud, and Fastmail calendars only.
Note that some organizations limit use of third party calendar tools. Please reach out if you need help providing documentation to your IT department to approve Morgen within your organization.
How does Morgen share my data?
Morgen collects only the data we need to run our services. We will never sell your data.
We do not share your information with third parties. The data we collect is stored and processed on cloud infrastructures provided by our partners (the data processors in GDPR terms). We store all data in Switzerland or in the European Union.
Learn more about our
Privacy Policy
.
Still have more questions?
Read more on our
FAQs
, ask on our
Discord
, or
Contact Us
.

changelog.title: Morgen changelog
changelog.text:
Morgen changelog
Morgen
changelog
morgen.so
General fixes and improvements
Morgen 4.0.5 & 4.0.6
Improvement
The organizer is now clearly marked in the attendee list of an event.
Fix
Fixed an issue where recurring event invites from Office 365 were showing attendees organizer-only actions (like sending) alongside the RSVP buttons.
Right-clicking on an empty spot in the calendar using MacBook touchpads now reliably opens the context menu.
Fixed app crashing affecting some Linux distributions.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
April 17
General fixes and improvements
Morgen Desktop 4.0.4
Improvement
Tasks/Routines now merge with events
having the same time and title when
Duplicate event merging
is enabled. This way, you can block the time for a task in another calendar without cluttering your view.
Improvement
The number of open tasks that can be imported from
Microsoft Planner
has been increased from 400 to 800.
Fix
A problem causing a crash when entering a location with specific formats has been fixed.
The free/busy status of events is preserved when creating an exception to a recurring series.
Safeguards are now in place to ensure the app does not start with the window offscreen on Windows.
Removing or adding participants from the mobile app was resetting the RSVP status of other participants. This problem has been solved.
A bug that was preventing rescheduling a recurring CalDAV event more than one week apart from its original starting time has been fixed.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
February 19
Hotfix for AI Planner & Todoist
Morgen Desktop 4.0.3
Fix
Fixes an issue where AI Planner stopped scheduling tasks.
Irony noted, back on track now.
A problem authenticating with Todoist has been resolved.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
February 12
Improved Tag Management, Extended CalDAV support & more
Morgen Desktop 4.0.1 / 4.0.2
New on Desktop
Tags are now managed in a centralized place.
Head to
Preferences > Tags
to view, edit, or delete your existing tags, or create new ones.
The
Developer API documentation
has also been updated, with a new page about tag management.
New on Desktop
Morgen 4.0.2 extends compatibility to CalDAV accounts
without
support for modern sync (WebDAV), and to accounts that require
Digest
authentication.
Improvement
Due dates can now be toggled off directly from the calendar. Click on a due date on the calendar, then select
Hide [space name] due dates
.
Event merging has been made less strict, now ignoring whitespace in event titles.
Colored checkboxes now show a tick icon with sufficient contrast.
Fix
An issue preventing the
Unschedule & delete task
option from deleting the task has been fixed.
A bug causing all-day events to be displayed one day too long in the macOS menu bar has been fixed. The Menu Bar now also updates faster on calendar changes.
Guidance on how to connect Outlook shared calendars to Morgen has been improved.
A problem computing the next due date for recurring tasks in some time zones has been fixed.
A rounding issue that could cause event durations with many decimal digits to be displayed in the event details panel has been fixed.
Some smaller UI inconsistencies or layout issues have been fixed.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
February 11
🎉 Welcome to Morgen 4
Morgen Desktop 4.0.0
After an extended beta period, Morgen 4 is now officially out of beta.
Morgen 4 is built on a fully refactored internal architecture, delivering improved stability, performance, and usability. This foundation enables Morgen on the web and significantly accelerates future feature development.
Your calendars will resync automatically. This might take a few minutes. If you don't see a calendar, you might need to reconnect in Preferences > Calendars.
👉 Morgen 4 no longer supports Exchange On-Premise (until modern APIs are available) nor some CalDAV servers that do not meet required specifications. Users who rely on these calendars should remain on Morgen 3.
Learn more
.
🏷️ New Morgen task properties
New on Desktop
New on Mobile
Morgen tasks are now more powerful with new properties that give you more control over planning. You can apply these properties both on desktop and mobile.
🏷️
Tags
to organize tasks across dimensions like project or context (e.g. client, deep work, admin).
🔜
Earliest start
to define when a task can be scheduled, helping AI respect dependencies (e.g. only plan “Prepare presentation” after data is received).
🔁
Repeating due dates
for recurring tasks that don’t need a fixed calendar time.
☑️ Routines
New on Desktop
New on Mobile
Routines replace recurring scheduled tasks. In addition to tasks with recurring due dates, you can now create Routines directly on your calendar. Routines are displayed like tasks, so you can check them off to track your progress, but do not clutter the task sidebar.
👬 Easier availability access
New on Desktop
You can now easily
toggle the availability of any contact
who has granted you access to their calendar, even if they are not part of your Morgen team. Contacts will stay in the sidebar, so you will be able to toggle them even faster the second time.
🤹‍♂️ Simplified event coloring
New on Desktop
Color coding specific events has been simplified. You no longer need to create a tag (in fact, tags have been moved from events to tasks). Instead, pick a color from the color picker next to the calendar name, or with a right-click. You can now also apply a color to tasks and Routines in the calendar.
🦾 Rescheduling quick-actions
New on Desktop
Morgen now offers quick rescheduling actions for tasks, accessible with right-click or via keyboard shortcut.
Reschedule this session
, when plans change
Complete & schedule more time
, when a task happens to take longer than expected
Split & reschedule remaining time
, when something comes up at the last minute and work needs to be rescheduled halfway through.
And more…
New on Desktop
Scheduled task statistics
: See in the sidebar how much time has been spent on a task, how much is already scheduled, and how much is needed to fulfil the estimate.
Obsidian improvements
: Added support for Bases, and now notes can be imported into Morgen as tasks.
Linear improvements
: Customizable mapping ticket estimate to hours.
Automatically add task due dates:
Creating a task on the calendar will set the due date as the day it was scheduled (can be toggled off in settings).
Customize when the day ends
: The end time of the calendar view can be set past midnight; helpful for people who work overnight shifts or are night owls
Teams Integration
: Microsoft Teams is no longer connected separately. Instead, it will be available as you connect your Outlook calendar (and is only available on Outlook calendars).
New on Mobile
Recurring events
: It is now possible to update all events in a series at once.
Participant editing
: Improved participant picker, and enabled adding and removing attendees on existing events.
Tablet
: Optimized views for larger screens.
🔗 Developer API
The developer documentation has been updated to explain how to access and manage Morgen tasks. Get started
here
.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
January 13
Morgen 4 Beta updates
🗞️ A notice about this changelog
Morgen 4 is currently in Beta, and the public release is planned for early January. All new features will only ship in Morgen 4.
As part of this transition, going forward this changelog will only reflect changes in Morgen 4, as Morgen 3 will receive only minor fixes and security updates.
Try Morgen 4 now
on the web
or by installing it from our
download page
.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
December 2025
🐞 Fix to custom recurrence parsing
Morgen Desktop 3.6.19
Fix
This release fixes an issue preventing the parsing of custom recurrence rules with natural language.
💁‍♂️
Morgen v4 is close to public release!. If you prefer to stay in v3 (this version), please disable auto-update in Preferences > General.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
September 2025
Getting ready for Morgen v4 🎉
Morgen Desktop 3.6.18
With Morgen v4 fast approaching, this release eases the transition.
With v4, Morgen's internal architecture will be simplified, allowing us to port Morgen to the web too. 🥳
Morgen v4 will drop support for Exchange on Premise and some CalDAV providers that do not support modern features for query and synchronization. Learn more on
our blog
about how this may impact you.
💁‍♂️ We will keep Morgen v3 (this version) available at least until Summer 2026. If you choose to stay with Morgen v3, you can now disable the auto-update.
👉
Please note: Our
Privacy Policy
has been updated in line with Morgen v4, outlining our continued commitment to protecting your privacy and data security.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
September 2025
Increased feed limit & more
Morgen Desktop 3.6.17
Improvement
The maximum size of calendar feeds you can connect to Morgen has been increased to
4MB
, so larger calendars can now sync without issues.
Fix
Fixed an issue where the app could
hang
after pressing
Connect
when authorizing a calendar account locally.
Resolved a problem that caused
infinite loading
when connecting a calendar to the
Morgen Cloud
in certain cases.
Morgen now falls back to the
browser
if opening a native third-party app (like Todoist) fails — for example, if the app isn’t installed.
The
AI Planner
now always schedules new slots for long tasks instead of moving existing ones.
The
support button
in the bottom-right corner is now permanently hidden.
Fixed a bug where the
“New task” button
could disappear with certain task list configurations.
Fixed an issue where some
Inbox tasks
were not visible.
Frame filters
now display task list colors, making it easier to select the right one.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
August 2025
Summer improvements
Morgen Desktop 3.6.16
Improvement
AI Planner
: AI Planner now respects all calendar settings for tasks, including whether to schedule tasks in the same calendar as the corresponding Frame or a default calendar for tasks.
Recurrent events:
The AI used to parse custom recurrence rules from natural language has been improved for greater reliability.
Fix
An issue that could cause the current time indicator to stay behind the actual time after resuming from the background has been rectified.
Morgen now correctly gives access to all available Google Calendars, even when there are many.
AI Planner no longer fails if a task has a fractional duration.
An issue that could cause duplicate notifications to be shown for the same event has been fixed.
The logo in your booking page now immediately updates when you upload a new one.
The preferred alias of a Fastmail account is now correctly used as the organizer's email for meetings booked via a Morgen Scheduling Link.
Marco, Co-founder @ Morgen
July 2025
Show previous changelogs

On This Page
What can you build?
📅 Calendar Events
✅ Tasks
🔗 Integrations
📆 Calendars
Getting Started
Question? Give us feedback
Edit this page
Scroll to top
Introduction
Morgen API
Build powerful calendar and task integrations with a unified API that works across Google Calendar, Microsoft 365, iCloud, and more.
🚀
Thinking of integrating Morgen into
your product or service
? Tell us
more about your API use case.
Contact us
⚠️
The Morgen API is in early access. While we strive not to make breaking changes within each major version, new fields may be added at any time without prior notice. Make sure your code handles unknown fields gracefully. We recommend following our
changelog
for updates.
What can you build?
The Morgen API provides a unified interface to interact with calendars and tasks across multiple providers. Here’s what you can do:
📅 Calendar Events
Create, read, update, and delete events across all connected calendar accounts. The API supports:
Recurring events
with flexible recurrence rules
Attendees and invitations
with participation status
Virtual meeting rooms
(Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Webex)
Reminders and alerts
customization
All-day and timed events
with timezone support
Learn more about Events →
✅ Tasks
Manage Morgen tasks programmatically—ideal for automations and integrations:
Create, update, and organize tasks
Set due dates, priorities, and estimated durations
Build subtask hierarchies
Mark tasks as complete or reopen them
Learn more about Tasks →
🔗 Integrations
Access all calendar accounts connected to a user’s Morgen account:
Google Calendar
and
Microsoft 365
iCloud
,
Fastmail
, and
CalDAV
providers
Calendar feeds
(read-only subscriptions)
Video conferencing
services (Zoom, Webex)
Learn more about Integrations →
📆 Calendars
List and manage calendars across all connected accounts, including calendar metadata and user permissions.
Learn more about Calendars →
Getting Started
Get your API key
— Sign up at
platform.morgen.so
and navigate to the Developers API page
Connect your calendars
— Use the Morgen app or platform to connect your calendar accounts
Start building
— Use your API key to authenticate requests
Get your API key →

January 9, 2026

INTEGRATIONS
Events, tasks, projects, scheduling.
Integrated.
Turn calendars into a canvas for daily planning. Time block to-dos and projects from across your stack, create scheduling links, and more.
Integrate your stack
Morgen integrates with your calendars, top to-do apps, project manager tools, and more.
Notion
Obsidian
Linear
Notion
Time block, adjust due dates, and sync status of Notion tasks from Morgen. Choose which properties to display and which tasks/databases to import.
Learn more
Obsidian
Connect your vault with this local only integration to time block Obsidian tasks. Sync done date and status from Morgen. Pair it with the Morgen Tasks plugin.
Learn more
Linear
Time block Linear issues in any calendar. Use Morgen as a team so others can see when issues are slated for development.
Learn more
Calendars
Task and Project Management
Automation
Virtual Conferencing
Thank you! Your submission has been received!
Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.
Calendars
Connect and consolidate your calendars, even across multiple accounts and providers.
Google Calendar
Consolidate personal and professional Google Calendars, including shared and team calendars.
Learn more
Outlook Calendar
Connect professional and personal Outlook Calendars, including shared and team calendars.
Learn more
iCloud
Connect your iCloud calendars. Morgen, seamlessly lets you manage them across all operating systems.
Learn more
Fastmail
Use our OAuth to connect Fastmail, ensuring the security and stability of your integration.
Learn more
CalDAV
Connect nearly any CalDAV, including Yahoo!, Daylight, Zoho, Nextcloud, fruux, and more.
Learn more
Subscription calendars
View your calendar feeds, be it your class time table, local holidays, or sports schedule. (Only available on desktop.)
Learn more
Data security
Data security and privacy you (and your IT department) can trust. We will never share or sell your data, and only request access to data necessary for the services you choose.
Task and Project Management
Seamlessly import tasks from your to-do apps and project management tools.
Notion
Time block, adjust due dates, and sync status of Notion tasks from Morgen. Choose which properties to display and which tasks/databases to import.
Learn more
Todoist
Time block your Todoist tasks in any calendar. Sync status and update due dates in Morgen.
Learn more
Obsidian
Connect your vault with this local only integration to time block Obsidian tasks. Sync done date and status from Morgen. Pair it with the Morgen Tasks plugin.
Learn more
ClickUp
Time block ClickUp tasks in any calendar. Update ClickUp's time tracker and task due dates from Morgen.
Learn more
Linear
Time block Linear issues in any calendar. Use Morgen as a team so others can see when issues are slated for development.
Learn more
Apple Reminders
See and organize your Reminders and block time to work on them in your calendar. Integration is local and available on macOS.
Learn more
Google Tasks
See your Google Tasks alongside your calendar and time block in any connected calendar.
Learn more
Outlook Email
Convert your flagged Outlook Emails to tasks in Morgen for easy filtering, prioritizing, and time blocking.
Learn more
Microsoft To Do
See your Microsoft To Do's alongside your calendars for easy filtering and time blocking.
Learn more
Automation
Integrate Morgen with TickTick, Things, Evernote, and more using Zapier.
Zapier
Automate nearly any integration. Copy the API key from Morgen to connect task apps, project managers, and more.
Learn more
Virtual Conferencing
Integrate your conferencing tools to generate links for all meetings, scheduling links, and open invites.
Zoom
Generate and add Zoom virtual conferencing links to meeting invites and scheduling links in one click.
Learn more
Google Meet
Generate and add Google Meet virtual conferencing links to meeting invites and scheduling links in one click.
Learn more
Microsoft Teams
Generate and add Microsoft Teams virtual conferencing links to meeting invites and scheduling links in one click.
Learn more
Webex
Generate and add Webex conferencing links to meeting invites and scheduling links in one click.
Learn more
Didn't find the integration you're looking for?
We're expanding our integrations. If you don't see a tool that's critical in your stack, please let us know.
Request an integration

analysis.name: Morgen
analysis.tagline: Daily plans designed by AI, perfected by you
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-powered daily planner that unifies calendars and tasks from across your stack into one app, auto-scheduling and time-blocking work to protect focus time.
analysis.ideal_customer: Knowledge workers, founders, and operators who juggle multiple calendars and task tools and want AI-assisted time-blocking with manual control retained.

features.name: ai planner
features.description: AI-powered daily planner that prioritizes tasks, detects scheduling conflicts, and recommends what to work on next.
features.evidence_quote: AI Planner helps reprioritize your plan in case of conflicts.

features.name: frames
features.description: Template your ideal week to guide the AI Planner; live recommendations appear in calendar based on your frame structure.
features.evidence_quote: Guide the AI Planner by templating your ideal week with Frames.

features.name: auto-schedule
features.description: Automatically schedule tasks into calendar slots; user can accept, adjust, or adapt AI suggestions.
features.evidence_quote: Confirm to schedule tasks in your calendar and protect time to achieve your goals.

features.name: task management
features.description: Built-in native tasks with properties including tags, priority, duration, earliest start, and repeating due dates.
features.evidence_quote: Morgen tasks are now more powerful with new properties that give you more control over planning.

features.name: subtasks
features.description: Build subtask hierarchies on Morgen tasks; accessible via API.
features.evidence_quote: Build subtask hierarchies

features.name: task tags
features.description: Organize tasks across dimensions like project or context (e.g. client, deep work, admin) using tags.
features.evidence_quote: Tags to organize tasks across dimensions like project or context (e.g. client, deep work, admin).

features.name: task earliest start
features.description: Define the earliest a task can be scheduled so AI respects dependencies between tasks.
features.evidence_quote: Earliest start to define when a task can be scheduled, helping AI respect dependencies.

features.name: repeating due dates
features.description: Recurring tasks with repeating due dates that don't require a fixed calendar time slot.
features.evidence_quote: Repeating due dates for recurring tasks that don't need a fixed calendar time.

features.name: task priority
features.description: Set priority levels on tasks to influence AI scheduling order.
features.evidence_quote: Set due dates, priorities, and estimated durations

features.name: task duration estimation
features.description: Set estimated duration on tasks so AI Planner allocates appropriate calendar blocks.
features.evidence_quote: Set due dates, priorities, and estimated durations

features.name: task statistics
features.description: See time spent, already scheduled, and remaining time per task in the sidebar.
features.evidence_quote: Scheduled task statistics: See in the sidebar how much time has been spent on a task

features.name: rescheduling quick-actions
features.description: Right-click quick actions to reschedule, split and reschedule remaining time, or complete and schedule more time.
features.evidence_quote: Reschedule this session / Complete & schedule more time / Split & reschedule remaining time

features.name: routines
features.description: Recurring activities displayed on the calendar like tasks (checkable) without cluttering the task sidebar.
features.evidence_quote: Routines replace recurring scheduled tasks... you can check them off to track your progress.

features.name: calendar consolidation
features.description: Connect and manage multiple calendar accounts across Google, Outlook, iCloud, Fastmail, and CalDAV in one view.
features.evidence_quote: Consolidate calendars from Google, Outlook, Apple, Fastmail and more in one app.

features.name: calendar sets
features.description: Customizable calendar shortcuts to view all calendars together, one at a time, or in subsets.
features.evidence_quote: View your calendars together, one at a time, or in subsets using customizable calendar shortcuts.

features.name: scheduling links
features.description: Built-in booking pages that check real-time availability across chosen calendars and allow others to book time.
features.evidence_quote: Booking Page + Scheduling Links

features.name: team availability
features.description: View colleagues' availability and get recommended meeting times that avoid disrupting their focus blocks.
features.evidence_quote: View your colleagues' availability and get recommended meeting times that won't disrupt their focus.

features.name: contact availability toggle
features.description: Toggle the availability of any contact who has granted calendar access, not just Morgen team members.
features.evidence_quote: Toggle the availability of any contact who has granted you access to their calendar.

features.name: calendar sync
features.description: Sync events from one calendar to another to show accurate availability and prevent double bookings; customizable copy rules.
features.evidence_quote: Sync events from one calendar to another to get an accurate view of your availability.

features.name: travel time blocking
features.description: Automatically block commute time before and after events, accounting for location, travel mode, and time of day.
features.evidence_quote: Automatically block time for your commute to and from events, taking into account location, mode of travel.

features.name: buffer time
features.description: Automatically schedule custom buffers around meetings for breaks or in case meetings run over.
features.evidence_quote: Automatically schedule custom buffers around meetings for intentional breaks or in case they run over.

features.name: reminders
features.description: Set one or more reminders per event or scheduled task; configurable per calendar or per event.
features.evidence_quote: Set one or more reminders for events and scheduled tasks.

features.name: event coloring
features.description: Color-code events, tasks, and routines directly from a color picker or right-click context menu.
features.evidence_quote: Color coding specific events has been simplified... pick a color from the color picker.

features.name: duplicate event merging
features.description: Tasks and routines with matching time and title merge with calendar events to reduce visual clutter.
features.evidence_quote: Tasks/Routines now merge with events having the same time and title when Duplicate event merging is enabled.

features.name: due date calendar display
features.description: Display task due dates directly on the calendar view; togglable per space.
features.evidence_quote: Due dates can now be toggled off directly from the calendar.

features.name: subscription calendars
features.description: View read-only calendar feeds such as class timetables, holidays, or sports schedules (desktop only).
features.evidence_quote: View your calendar feeds, be it your class time table, local holidays, or sports schedule.

features.name: caldav support
features.description: Connect CalDAV providers including Yahoo!, Daylight, Zoho, Nextcloud, fruux; supports Digest auth and accounts without WebDAV.
features.evidence_quote: Connect nearly any CalDAV, including Yahoo!, Daylight, Zoho, Nextcloud, fruux, and more.

features.name: video conferencing link generation
features.description: Generate and attach Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, or Webex links to meetings and scheduling links in one click.
features.evidence_quote: Generate and add Zoom virtual conferencing links to meeting invites and scheduling links in one click.

features.name: outlook email to tasks
features.description: Convert flagged Outlook emails into Morgen tasks for filtering, prioritizing, and time blocking.
features.evidence_quote: Convert your flagged Outlook Emails to tasks in Morgen for easy filtering, prioritizing, and time blocking.

features.name: zapier automation
features.description: Connect Morgen to TickTick, Things, Evernote, and other apps via Zapier using the Morgen API key.
features.evidence_quote: Automate nearly any integration. Copy the API key from Morgen to connect task apps, project managers.

features.name: developer api
features.description: Early-access REST API for programmatic CRUD on calendar events, tasks, integrations, and calendars across all connected providers.
features.evidence_quote: Build powerful calendar and task integrations with a unified API that works across Google Calendar, Microsoft 365, iCloud.

features.name: morgen assist workflows
features.description: Smart calendar automation workflows that run directly against Google, Outlook, iCloud, and Fastmail without requiring the Morgen app.
features.evidence_quote: You can use Morgen Assist directly with your Google, Outlook, iCloud, and Fastmail calendars without using the Morgen app.

features.name: multi-platform app
features.description: Native apps for Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, and browser/web.
features.evidence_quote: App for Windows, macOS, Linux, mobile & browser

features.name: microsoft planner integration
features.description: Import up to 800 open tasks from Microsoft Planner for time blocking.
features.evidence_quote: The number of open tasks that can be imported from Microsoft Planner has been increased from 400 to 800.

features.name: apple reminders integration
features.description: View and time block Apple Reminders in the calendar; local macOS integration.
features.evidence_quote: See and organize your Reminders and block time to work on them in your calendar. Integration is local and available on macOS.

features.name: obsidian integration
features.description: Local vault integration to time block Obsidian tasks; syncs done date and status; works with Morgen Tasks plugin.
features.evidence_quote: Connect your vault with this local only integration to time block Obsidian tasks.

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: Swiss-hosted infrastructure; data stored in Switzerland or EU; no data selling or third-party sharing.
features.evidence_quote: Swiss-hosted & GDPR compliant

differentiators: AI Planner with manual override — 'auto + manual' control vs competitors' fully auto-moves
Linux desktop app support (rare among calendar tools)
Swiss-hosted, GDPR-compliant data storage (not US-based like Motion, Reclaim, Sunsama)
Frames — template ideal week to guide AI without relinquishing control
Morgen Assist workflows usable without the Morgen desktop app
Unified 7+ task integration imports (Notion, Linear, ClickUp, Todoist, Obsidian, etc.) on all paid plans
Travel time and buffer time automation built-in
Starting price $15/mo vs Motion $19/mo and Sunsama $20/mo

recent_ships.what: Morgen 4.0.5/4.0.6: organizer marking in attendee list, Office 365 recurring event RSVP fix, Linux crash fix
recent_ships.source: The organizer is now clearly marked in the attendee list of an event.

recent_ships.what: Morgen 4.0.4: Tasks/Routines merge with same-titled events, Microsoft Planner limit raised from 400 to 800 tasks
recent_ships.source: Tasks/Routines now merge with events having the same time and title when Duplicate event merging is enabled.

recent_ships.what: Morgen 4.0.3: hotfix for AI Planner stopping task scheduling; Todoist auth fix
recent_ships.source: Fixes an issue where AI Planner stopped scheduling tasks.

recent_ships.what: Morgen 4.0.1/4.0.2: centralized tag management in Preferences, extended CalDAV support (Digest auth, no-WebDAV servers)
recent_ships.source: Tags are now managed in a centralized place. Head to Preferences > Tags.

recent_ships.what: Morgen 4.0.0 GA: full architecture refactor, web app launch, task tags, earliest start, repeating due dates, Routines, rescheduling quick-actions, task statistics, simplified event coloring, contact availability toggle
recent_ships.source: Morgen 4 is built on a fully refactored internal architecture, delivering improved stability, performance, and usability.

praised: Best Linux-supported scheduling and calendar app — 'by far the best Linux-supported scheduling and calendar app so far'
Consistent cross-platform UX (Linux + Mac) — 'great to have the same UX on both machines'
Seamless Notion drag-and-drop time blocking — 'integrates seamlessly with Notion, allowing me to time block all of my tasks simply by dragging and dropping'
Centralizes multiple calendars and task tools in one place — 'Instead of flipping between 10 different tabs, browsers and apps, I now open just one'
Beautiful, uncluttered interface — 'A beautiful, uncluttered interface'
Customer service responsiveness — 'Customer service is *chefs kiss* - any question is quickly answered'
Confetti animation on task completion — 'Never have I crossed off so many completed to-dos... plus that confetti'
complaints: TickTick not natively supported (user had to switch to Todoist) — 'had to change tick tick to todoist but I can work with that'
Exchange On-Premise dropped in Morgen 4 — noted in changelog as a regression for affected users

tiers.name: Pro Monthly
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI Planner, unlimited calendar+task integrations, calendar automations, scheduling links, all platforms

tiers.name: Pro Yearly
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Pro Monthly features + all future updates; billed $180/year

tiers.name: Team Monthly
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI Planner, unlimited integrations, calendar automations, scheduling links, all platforms; min 2 seats

tiers.name: Team Yearly
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Team Monthly features; cancel anytime; min 2 seats; billed $120/seat/year

pricing.notes: 14-day free trial with full access, no credit card required. 30-day money-back guarantee. Minimum 2 seats on team plans. Pro-rated billing on mid-cycle seat changes. 15% off for 1 year when switching from Motion, Reclaim, Fantastical, or Sunsama. 25% off forever for students, academics, and nonprofits. Payments via Paddle (PayPal, Apple Pay, major cards). No explicit enterprise tier listed.
